description: Real SUPERAGENT_CAPTURE_DIR capture of the busy-completion bug. The agent backgrounds `sleep 20` (run_in_background), then immediately blocks on a ~35s foreground CPU busy-loop. The background task settles WHILE the agent is busy, so the SDK delivers its completion as a `task_updated` patch (task_id=bsyucgy9g, patch.status=completed) — NOT a matching `task_notification`. The only `task_notification` in the stream is for the foreground command (task_id=bekq0a9h9), a different id. Before the fix, the persister had no `task_updated` handler, so bsyucgy9g was never cleared and the session stayed pinned in session_waiting_background.
